description_long: This is a small, pixel-art style bottle with a cylindrical body and a wide, ribbed red screw cap. The bottle is primarily brown with a bold red label that wraps around its midsection, featuring white blocky text and graphic elements reminiscent of retro video game aesthetics. The label includes a barcode and what appears to be stylized text or branding, with the most prominent text reading 'DRINK' in large, white, pixelated letters. The bottle's surface appears matte and solid, with no visible transparency or contents. The overall design suggests it is a beverage container, likely intended for single-use and easy portability. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle's structure is intact and undistorted.
description: A small, brown bottle with a red screw cap and a bold, pixel-art style red label featuring white blocky text and graphics. The design is retro and eye-catching, with a matte, opaque surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red label with large, white pixelated text 'DRINK' and part of a graphic design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying more of the label's graphic elements, including a barcode and additional stylized text.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the barcode and the plain red section of the label, with minimal text visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the main label text and a mostly plain red label area.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with large, white, pixelated text reading 'DRINK', additional white blocky graphics, and a black-and-white barcode. The style is retro and video game-inspired.
